title: Serve integration tests on the injected listener
prompt: Repair the integration server startup race. Callers pass an already-bound loopback listener to Start; startup must keep that reservation and serve on the injected listener instead of closing it and attempting to bind the same address again. Preserve the public API and exact listener address reporting. The protected integration cases run in parallel, register cleanup for clients, servers, and listeners, and make a competing bind deterministic; all exact address assertions must pass. Do not modify the protected tests. Run `bash test.sh`; verification is offline and deterministic, and uses the race-enabled Go suite when a Go toolchain is available.
